roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 68D/CTS:68/4019HALF/WS/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH INDIVIDUAL TREATMENT AND REHABILITATION  PLAN AS DIRECTED BY ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/SA1:MARGARET DEJONE/SA2:2926 FILLMORE ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:UPON 1 YEAR OF SUCCESSFUL PROBATION DEFENDANT MAY PETITION THE  COURT FOR A MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
